segments.text: Geoffrey:Good evening, and in this week's edition of Focus on the Arts', Jane Hemmington is going to fill us in on what's in store for us at this year's Summer Festival.
segments.translation: 杰弗里：晚上好，这期的《聚焦艺术》，简·海明顿将告诉我们今年的夏季嘉年华会有什么。

segments.text: Over to you, Jane.
segments.translation: 接下来交给你，简。

segments.text: JANE:Thank you, Geoffrey.
segments.translation: 简：谢谢，杰弗里。

segments.text: This year, the Summer Festival Is the biggest we've ever seen, so there should be something for everybody.
segments.translation: 今年的夏季嘉年华是我们所见过的最盛大的一场，所以那里肯定会为大家呈现精彩的一幕。

segments.text: This is the third year they've run it and the timing's slightly different: for the last couple of years, it's been around the fifth to seventeenth, but this year they wanted to allow everyone enough time to recover from the first of January celebrations and they've put it at the end of the month.
segments.translation: 这次是他们举办的第三年，而时间上会稍有不同。前几年是在5日到17日左右，但是今年他们想让每个人有足够的时间从第一个一月的庆祝中缓过来，所以他们将日期安排在了月底。

segments.text: The programme has sensational theatre, dance and also a large number of art exhibitions, but the thing the Festival is most famous for is its great street music.
segments.translation: 节目包括引人轰动的戏剧，舞蹈和大量的艺术展览，但是嘉年华最著名的是它的街头音乐。

segments.text: For today's report though, Geoffrey, I'm looking at some of the theatrical events that you might like to see;
segments.translation: 杰弗里，至于今天的报道，我看到了一些戏剧性的事情，你也许也想看看。

segments.text: in particular, at this year's theme - circuses.
segments.translation: 特别是今年的主题是马戏团。

segments.text: I'm going to tell you about two circus performances, but there are plenty of others in the programme.
segments.translation: 我打算跟你们讲讲其中两个马戏团的表演，不过这里还有很多其他的马戏团。

segments.text: I've chosen these because they represent distinct movements within circus performance.
segments.translation: 我选择这两个是因为它们在马戏团的表演中与众不同。

segments.text: The first is the Circus Romano from Italy.
segments.translation: 第一个是来自意大利的罗马诺马戏团。

segments.text: As this is a travelling circus, it follows a long tradition by performing in a marquee - which is really like a canvas portable building, usually put up in a green space or car park, rather than in a theatre or stadium.
segments.translation: 这是一个巡回马戏团，它遵循传统在大帐篷里表演，它像是一个帆布的便携式建筑，通常建在绿地和停车场，而不是在剧院或体育场里。

segments.text: In spite of this, Circus Romano isn't at all like the traditional circuses I grew up with.
segments.translation: 尽管如此，罗马诺马戏团并不像陪我长大的那些传统马戏团一样。

segments.text: There are no animals - just very talented clowning and acrobatic routines.
segments.translation: 这里没有动物，只有非常聪明的小丑和杂技。

segments.text: The show has a lot of very funny moments, especially at the beginning , but the best part is the music and lighting.
segments.translation: 表演有很多有趣的场面，特别是开始的时候，但是最棒的是音乐和灯光。

segments.text: They're magical.
segments.translation: 非常魔幻。

segments.text: At forty-five dollars it's very expensive anyway - it's really for adult tastes.
segments.translation: 总之，45美元是很贵的，很符合成人的口味。

segments.text: In fact , much of it would be wasted on children - so I suggest you leave them at home.
segments.translation: 事实上，对孩子来说有点浪费，所以我建议你们把孩子留在家里。

segments.text: The second circus performance is Circus Electrica at the Studio Theatre.
segments.translation: 第二个马戏团表演是在小剧场的电力马戏团。

segments.text: The purists are suggesting that this isn't a circus at all.
segments.translation: 纯粹主义者说这根本不是一个马戏团。

segments.text: It's a showcase for skills in dance and magic, rather than the usual ones you expect in a circus.
segments.translation: 这里展示的是舞蹈和魔术的技巧，而不是你期望在马戏团里看到的那些普通节目。

segments.text: With only six performers, it's a small production, which suits the venue well - the Studio only seals about two hundred people.
segments.translation: 里面只有6名艺人，它是一个小型演出，很适合这个场地。

segments.text: For my money it's the aerial displays which are outstanding as well as the magical tricks - features which are missing from Circus Romano.
segments.translation: 在我看来，空中表演和魔术一样精彩，这些特色是罗马诺马戏团没有的。

segments.text: An interesting feature of the show is that the performers are so young - the youngest is only fourteen.
segments.translation: 节目的一个有趣的特点是表演者都很年轻，最年轻的一位只有14岁。

segments.text: But it's still well worth seeing: a good one for the whole family.
segments.translation: 但是仍然非常值得一看，是一个适合全家看的好节目。

segments.text: And finally, as it's summer, you may wish to see some of the Festival performances that are being presented outdoors.
segments.translation: 最后，正值夏日，你也许想看看一些室外的嘉年华表演。

segments.text: Like the famous Mekong Water Puppet Troupe, performing in the City Gardens this week.
segments.translation: 比如这周在城市花园表演的湄公河水木偶剧团。

segments.text: Now, water puppetry is amazing!
segments.translation: 水上木偶戏太棒了。

segments.text: It's large puppets on long sticks controlled by puppeteers standing waist deep in the lake.
segments.translation: 长棍上有一个大的木偶，由操纵木偶者在及腰的湖水中控制。

segments.text: The puppets do comedy routines and there is some terrific formation dancing.
segments.translation: 木偶会做一些喜剧节目和出色的团体舞。

segments.text: This is a fantastic show and the best moment comes at the end - seeing the puppeteers.
segments.translation: 这是一场极其棒的节目，最好的部分是在结尾的时候见到操作木偶者。

segments.text: When the troupe walks up out of the water, you get this amazing feeling.
segments.translation: 当团队从水中出来，你会感到很震惊。

segments.text: It's really hard to believe that what you've been watching is lifeless wood and cloth.
segments.translation: 你很难相信看到的只是一些没有生命的木头和布。

segments.text: As an adult, I had a great time, but I did note that other older people in the audience weren't quite as taken with it as I was.
segments.translation: 作为一个成年人，我度过了美好的时光，但是我也注意到一些比我年龄大的观众并不像我一样享受。

segments.text: It's a must for young children though, and that's the audience it's really aimed at.
segments.translation: 它肯定更适合小孩子，这也是他们的受众群体。

segments.text: Well, that's all I've time for today, but I'll be back next week with more news of what's worth seeing and what it's best to miss.
segments.translation: 今天就是这样，但是下周我会带来更多值得观看和最不容错过的消息。
